title: make dbuild fixed on ubuntu/debian
body:
The `image-name` was passed before docker run option, which results into error.
This PR fixes this.

Signed-off-by: Kunal Kushwaha <kushwaha_kunal_v7@lab.ntt.co.jp>

comments.body:

- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
LGTM assuming happy tests.  Thanks for the PR!
